headline: Caitlin Clark Hits Game-Winning 3-Pointer to Push Fever Past Mystics
story_summary: The Indiana guard drained a three-pointer with 1.2 seconds left to beat Sonia Citron and Washington 78-76 on the road.
key_fact_1: The Indiana guard drained a three-pointer with 1.2 seconds left to beat Sonia Citron and Washington 78-76 on the road.
key_fact_2: The buzzer-beater snapped a rough stretch for the Fever, moving Indiana to 6-5 on the season.
key_fact_3: Then, with 4.3 seconds remaining, Citron sank two free throws to put the Mystics ahead 76-75.
main_takeaway: The buzzer-beater snapped a rough stretch for the Fever, moving Indiana to 6-5 on the season.

headline: Texas’s 2026 WCWS Finals Win Shatters NCAA Softball Viewership Records
